item.title: Odin – The Empty Rune
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: SILENCE

Main Topic: DESTINY

Crystal: MOLDAVITE

Color: NONE

The empty rune, dedicated to Odin, stands for fate and helps us to cope with the uncertainty of life. 

Odin symbolizes inevitable happenings, positive and negative in nature. Expect the unexpected, but never interpret too much into the events and signs. Because what will be will be – it is your destiny, and you can not miss it. 

Secondary Topics:
Omega Chakra, Beyond, Otherworld, Freedom, Infinity, Letting go, Trust, Connection, Wisdom, Vitality, Happiness, Self-knowledge, Brings limitless space and lifts all veils 

"Know that you are safe. Let go of all control. Be in the storm of life, be this storm yourself, and have faith. You have shaped your fate – now let it shape you."

item.title: Thorn
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: TH

Main Topic: PORTAL

Crystal: ONYX

Color: BLACK

Protection, refuge, defense. 

Thorn symbolizes protection from the stresses of life and also stands for the need for patience. Sometimes plans should be saved for better times and decisions should be taken only after very careful consideration. Sometimes happiness comes from unexpected sources. 

Secondary Topics:
Assertiveness, Intellect, Shadow work, Strengthens self-confidence and self-perception, Improves sober thinking, logic and argumentative power, Promotes a sense of responsibility, Sharpens the sense of hearing, Increases resistance, Improves nerve function 

"Only pure things can reflect absolute truth."

item.title: Inguz
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: ING

Main Topic: FERTILITY

Crystal: MOONSTONE (NOT WHITE LABRADORITE)

Color: SKINCOLOR

Increases fertility and promotes growth in a wide variety of areas of life. 

Inguz symbolizes beginnings, new beginnings, births of all kinds – this can also mean the completion of a project or the implementation of a long-cherished plan. This rune can also mark a small event that will have a big impact. 

Secondary Topics:
Alpha Chakra, Intuition, Inspiration, Mindfulness, Sensitivity, Clairvoyance, Freedom, Security, Femininity, Birth, Broadens the horizon and at the same time helps to remain realistic, Makes the emotional life easier and more accessible 

"No tree, it is said, can grow to heaven, unless its roots reach down to hell."

item.title: Eoh
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: EI

Main Topic: CHANGE

Crystal: PETRIFIED WOOD

Color: LIGHT BROWN

Helps to deal positively with the unforeseen changes in life. 

Eoh is the symbol of eternal life and protector of letting go. Time is an energy that causes change. You're always doing best when you live in the now and don't let yourself be blinded by the past or the future.

Secondary Topics:
Well-being, Down-to-earthness, Contentment, Makes stable and rooted in oneself, Makes feelings more flowing and easier to express, Helps to be fully focused on one subject, Lets us see the good things in life, Helps to use changes coming from outside constructively

"Learn how to see – realize that everything connects to everything else."

item.title: Eolh
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: Z

Main Topic: PROTECTION

Crystal: AVENTURINE

Color: LIGHT GREEN

Protects against negative influences of any kind. 

Eolh is the rune of defense and protection. With the protection of Eolh one can achieve all of one's goals, knowing that every obstacle will be overcome. This rune can be used against all external energies. 

Secondary Topics:
Light-heartedness, Joie de vivre, Lightness, Courage, Optimism, Relaxation, Recovery, Strengthens inner balance, Promotes self-determination, Helps with stress, nervousness and sleep disorders, Helps to let go of worries and circular thoughts, Relieves rashes, inflammation and sunburn 

"Do not be afraid – you are carrying the entire universe inside of you."

item.title: Wyn
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: W

Main Topic: JOY

Crystal: GREEN TOURMALINE

Color: TRANSPARENT-GREEN

Brings new dimensions of joy and satisfaction. 

Wyn symbolizes a state of mind of contentment and happiness. It stands for the love for work, which is only available if you follow your calling and are satisfied with yourself and the world after the work is done. Wyn is also the rune of balance in all things. 

Secondary Topics:
Gratitude, Joy, Hope, Peace, Self-realization, Grounding, Self-love, Reorientation, Clarity, Flexibility, Helps to see the wonders of life, Detoxifies, Promotes interest in fellow human beings and the environment 

"Those who walk any stony path with their heads held high and without a single doubt in mind will always be where their light is needed."

item.title: Uruz
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: U

Main Topic: STRENGTH

Crystal: SUGILITE

Color: PURPLISH-BLUE

Helps to find the inner sun and gives hope and perseverance. 

Uruz stands for the chance to prove your strength in tough times. There is great strength in every human being, but it can only be implemented with the right attitude. It is sustained performance, rather than simple muscle strength, that makes us reach our goals. 

Secondary Topics:
Action and consistency, Energy, Courage, Perseverance, Inner Strength, Mental Strength, Encourages you to remain true to yourself, Helps with fears, Helps to resolve conflicts, Relieves paranoia, Gives the strength to end projects uncompromisingly, Strengthens the will for self-realization, Supports grief work

"Desire. Ask. Believe. Receive."

item.title: Tyr
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: T

Main Topic: JUSTICE

Crystal: HELIOTROPE

Color: REDGREEN

Protects against injustice and ensures triumph – the rune of warriors. 

Tyr symbolizes victory in a fight or competition and can also refer to business. Since Tyr is the symbol of invincibility, it also stands for positive progress and the accomplishment of a plan. 

Secondary Topics:
Immune Protection, Strength, Courage, Vitality, Balance, Cheerfulness, Helps to maintain control and to separate oneself from surrounding events, Promotes concentration and mindfulness, Strengthens the lymph and the immune system, Helps with heart problems and flu, Relieves the symptoms of colds and infections 

"We are all warriors in the battle for awakening."

item.title: Sigel
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: S

Main Topic: SUN

Crystal: TIGER’S EYE

Color: GOLD

Promotes strength, health, prosperity and satisfaction.

Sigel is the rune of the sun, and therefore it symbolizes inspiration, vitality, prosperity and luck. Sigel also stands for success and is the symbol of the soul. This rune is said to be able to banish evil.  

Secondary Topics:
Courage, Protection, Security, Perspective, Distance, Objectivity, Vitality, Optimism, Inner Strength, Frees from stress and strain, Sharpens the senses, Helps to keep the perspective when everything goes very quickly, Regulates the adrenal glands, Regulates asthma attacks, Strengthens the bronchi, Promotes concentration, Balances the mood and makes you calmer

"Energy can never be destroyed, only transformed."

item.title: Raido
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: R

Main Topic: JOURNEY

Crystal: TURQUOISE

Color: TURQUOISE

Starting something always brings profit and yet everything is left to chance. 

Peorth is a very good omen that brings with it a secret uncovered or hard-earned wealth. Appearances are not what they claim to be and therefore one has to look beyond the surface of things. If you look at life from there, you feel considerably better and ideals can change.  

Secondary Topics:
Third Eye Chakra, Fate, Journey, Intuition, Initiation, Talisman, Self-confidence, Success, Strength, Has a balancing and encouraging effect, Protects against external influences, Calms the inside, Enables the causes of happiness and unhappiness to be recognized, Helps with exhaustion

"A good traveller has no fixed plans and is not intent on arriving."

item.title: Peorth
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: P

Main Topic: CHANCE

Crystal: SMOKEY QUARTZ

Color: TRANSPARENT-BLACK

Starting something always brings profit and yet everything is left to chance. 

Peorth is a very good omen that brings with it a secret uncovered or hard-earned wealth. Appearances are not what they claim to be and therefore one has to look beyond the surface of things. If you look at life from there, you feel considerably better and ideals can change.  

Secondary Topics:
Relaxation, Vitality, Courage, Coping with grief and losses,Protects against negative energies, Alleviates the effects of stress, Calms the nerves, Promotes sober, realistic and pragmatic reflections 

"The thought is a devil who claims to be me."

item.title: Odel
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: O

Main Topic: HOME

Crystal: MALACHITE

Color: DARK GREEN

Brings home closer to the heart. 

Odel represents family, love and possessions that have been inherited. The home reflects the inner sanctuary, the private sphere within yourself. All aspects and trials of life – successes and failures – are part of this place. 

Secondary Topics:
Adventure, Intensive life, Fantasy, Deepens the emotional life, Stimulates creativity, Calms the mind and sharpens the inner view, Gives hope in gloomy times, Promotes imagination and determination, Helps with abdominal pain of any origin, Stimulates the brain, nerves and liver, Detoxifies, Helps with rheumatism and cramps 

"You are not what you have – but what you have is you."

item.title: Nyd
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: N

Main Topic: NEED

Crystal: TOURMALINE QUARTZ

Color: BLACKWHITE (YINYANG)

Helps make dreams a reality and balances the inner self. 

Nyd indicates that now is a good time to act, but it should be approached with patience. If you take your time, blockages are released and dreams become reality. 

Secondary Topics:
Combines polarities, Self-perception, Stability, Clarity in chaotic situations, Adaptability, Helps to resolve internal struggles and conflicts, Enables opposites to be brought into harmony, Relieves tension and cramps 

"Our wealth is not measured by what we have, but by what we can do without."

item.title: Man
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: M

Main Topic: THE SELF

Crystal: ROCK CRYSTAL

Color: TRANSPARENT-WHITE

Strengthens any kind of connection such as friendship or partnership. 

Man stands for man as a magician who has lost the power to control bad things. In addition, this rune reflects that part of us that is able to make the right decisions at the right time. Relationships should be nurtured and understood – this includes our relationship with ourselves, others and the world. 

Secondary Topics:
Maturity, Experience, Expansion of consciousness, Union, Understanding, Clarity, Neutrality, Improved perception, Strengthens one's own point of view, Improves memory, Promotes understanding and presence, Releases blockages 

"Know the web and thus yourself as its weaver."

item.title: Laguz
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: L

Main Topic: WATER

Crystal: LAPIS LAZULI

Color: BLUE

Supports the development of mental abilities and mindfulness. 

Laguz stands for water and is associated with all elements of the sea. Just as the sea tests the sailor, Laguz tests us, too, by confronting us with tasks that push us to our limits and thus closer to ourselves. Laguz brings initiation and the ability to be mentally open and receptive to the waters of life and the cycle of waves. 

Secondary Topics:
Throat Chakra, Truth, Sincerity, Dignity, Sociability, Friendship, Self-responsibility, Authenticity, Helps to tell and accept the truth 

"Inner strength means to know the depths of the self and to swim through them without fear."

item.title: Ken
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: K

Main Topic: FIRE / WOOD

Crystal: RED TIGER’S EYE

Color: REDBROWN

Helps to restore willpower, strength and prosperity. 

Ken symbolizes talent, strength and procreation and with it a sudden flood of energy and growth. Ken has a positive influence on all types of commerce. This rune is also a good omen for personal relationships, as it stands for perseverance and persistence. 

Secondary Topics:
Root Chakra, Perspective, Inner Peace, Security, Concentration, Attention, Mindfulness, Warmth, Sharpens the thoughts, Vigilance, Friendship, Closeness, Helps to find one's way in a new environment 

"Reality is mind creation – perception forms experience and experience forms consciousness."

item.title: Jera
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: J

Main Topic: HARVEST

Crystal: MOSS AGATE

Color: MOSS GREEN

Stands for the reward of productive, hard work.

Jera means harvest and thus stands for the year-round cycle of give and take. Jera can, for example, symbolize that past deeds will soon be settled and thus rewarded. This rune often illustrates the end of one cycle and the beginning of another. Jera also symbolizes a leader or a powerful character. 

Secondary Topics:
Liberation, Lightness, Light-heartedness, Frees from heaviness, pressure and strain, Empowers conscious action, Promotes communication, Stimulates the mind, Cleanses the tissue 

"Life’s only constant is change."

item.title: Is
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: I

Main Topic: ICE

Crystal: PEACE AGATE

Color: WHITE

Helps to freeze certain situations and ground overwhelming emotions. 

Is represents the power of cooling and retention. This rune could indicate that certain matters are better put on hold right now. Is can show a certain lack of drive and wants to remind us how important patience can be so that things can be understood crystal clear at a later point in time. 

Secondary Topics:
Calm, Peace, Security, Balance, Strengthens the inner concentration for kindness and lightheartedness, Promotes tolerance and indulgence, Gives self-confidence and warmth, Relieves aggression, Takes away the fear of being alone, Gives comfort in all forms of separation 

"Where intention goes, energy flows."

item.title: Hagalaz
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: H

Main Topic: AIR

Crystal: LABRADORITE

Color: LIGHT BLUE

Helps to get rid of negative energies and create a positive impact. 

Hagalaz's message is "be satisfied with what you have" so that you can have a stress-free everyday life. Certain things are beyond our control – when we stop wanting something, we are open to receiving. This rune is able to free us from old patterns and restrictions. 

Secondary Topics:
Reflection, Truth, Protection, Sensitivity, Strengthens intuition, depth of feeling and medial gifts, Brings forgotten memories to light, Helps to see through illusions, Promotes appreciation, Stimulates imagination, creativity and enthusiasm, Promotes alertness and the ability to observe 

"Who looks outside dreams – who looks inside awakes."

item.title: Gyfu
item.dc:creator: Dada Chi
item.content:encoded:
Tone: G

Main Topic: LOVE

Crystal: ROSE QUARTZ

Color: PINK

Helps to understand the balance between life, peace, and goodwill.

In general, Gyfu is the symbol of good omens – but especially when it comes to romantic relationships. Gyfu stands for generosity, giving, charity and for sharing or giving in the light of love. 

Secondary Topics:
Heart Chakra, Compassion, Love, Charity, Sensitivity, Empathy, Open-mindedness, Romance, Harmonious Coexistence, Helpfulness, Refines the perception, Clarifies own needs and the wishes of others 

"The universe is eternal because it does not enliven itself – it gives life to everything while it transforms itself."
